# TestCo thesis

## In one sentence

TestCo builds infrastructure that doesn't break — a fictional company
used by the Astra test suite.

## What TestCo does

Provides a stable kit fixture that exercises every code path in the
creator stack: kit loading, voice scanning, section-aware markdown
editing, brand.yml round-trip, and forbidden-phrase regeneration.

## The wedge

The wedge is that TestCo is fictional and therefore can never be
wrong — every claim in this thesis is true by definition.

## Why now

Because tests should pass.
